creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
On Thu, Nov 30, 2000 at 05:44:06PM -0800, jay@avacet.com wrote:
> >Description:
> rxvt-devel port doesn't include "--enable-rxvt-scroll"  (or any scrollbar) in CONFIGURE_ARGS.
> Scrollbar is pretty much expected in an xterm-workalike.
> Possibly menubar as well.	

	Unfortunaly, I disagree. It is a bikeshed discussion.
	I can add both WITH_SCROLLBAR and WITH_MENUBAR build
time options. This way, whoever wants it can get it without
having to touch the Makefile.
	Is that a good compromise? :)
 
-- 
Mario S F Ferreira - UnB - Brazil - "I guess this is a signature."

flames to beloved devnull@someotherworldbeloworabove.org
